'''tazoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foen|foen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foen|foen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tazoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzeseth|tæzeseth]] || [[word:tæzesej|tæzesej]] || [[word:tæzesesh|tæzesesh]] || [[word:tæzese|tæzese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazozosoth|tazozosoth]] || [[word:tazozosoj|tazozosoj]] || [[word:tazozososh|tazozososh]] || [[word:tazozoso|tazozoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazosoth|tazosoth]] || [[word:tazosoj|tazosoj]] || [[word:tazososh|tazososh]] || [[word:tazoso|tazoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazofsoth|tazofsoth]] || [[word:tazofsoj|tazofsoj]] || [[word:tazofsosh|tazofsosh]] || [[word:tazofsof|tazofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazosotho|tazosotho]] || [[word:tazosojo|tazosojo]] || [[word:tazososho|tazososho]] || [[word:tazosoko|tazosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazosoth|tazosoth]] || [[word:tazosoj|tazosoj]] || [[word:tazososh|tazososh]] || [[word:tazoso|tazoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazosothol|tazosothol]] || [[word:tazosojol|tazosojol]] || [[word:tazososhol|tazososhol]] || [[word:tazosokol|tazosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazosothotho|tazosothotho]] || [[word:tazosojojo|tazosojojo]] || [[word:tazososhosho|tazososhosho]] || [[word:tazosoko|tazosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazosothon|tazosothon]] || [[word:tazosojon|tazosojon]] || [[word:tazososhon|tazososhon]] || [[word:tazosokon|tazosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazosothoro|tazosothoro]] || [[word:tazosojoro|tazosojoro]] || [[word:tazososhoro|tazososhoro]] || [[word:tazosokoro|tazosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
